notes: Cross-sectional RSI long/short. EA runs one instance per host symbol; each ranks the 10-symbol universe by RSI(14) on the closed D1 bar and goes LONG the host if it is top-N, SHORT if bottom-N. RSI used as a cross-sectional rank STATE (not a cross event). Foreign reads via QM_SymbolGuardInit + QM_BasketWarmupHistory. Card's GER40 ported to GDAXI.DWX; XAU/XAG/XTI normalized to .DWX. SP500.DWX is a backtest-only read member. One position per magic per host.
